meta.principle: This JSON is the single source of truth. To change the homepage you edit VALUES here and run apply_site_design — never touch the .liquid by hand.

sections.description: Dark scrolling announcement bar at the very top of the page content.
sections.behavior: items are concatenated with ' · ' and scrolled right-to-left infinitely (CSS animation).

sections.description: Full-bleed hero with a 7-image crossfade carousel, headline, sub, CTA, and clickable nav dots.
sections.headline: Soft. Modern. Made for first moments.
sections.sub: Thoughtfully designed baby essentials in premium organic cotton.
sections.images_note: Use ONLY baby/kids-relevant images, and do NOT reuse images shown elsewhere on the site. Swap any URL below to change a slide.
sections.behavior: slides are tags; JS toggles the 'active' class on a timer and on dot click; a dark gradient overlay keeps the white text readable.

sections.description: A 4-up uppercase trust bar directly under the hero.
Large image tiles linking to the main collections, with a hover zoom.
sections.heading: Shop by category

sections.description: The main shop grid — pulls the store's REAL products (image, title, price), 3:4 cards with hover zoom and a rise-in animation.
sections.heading: Shop All

sections.description: Real-sounding customer reviews — social proof that people bought and are happy.
sections.heading: Loved by parents
sections.rotation: The renderer shuffles this pool on every page load and shows `show_count` of them — so reviews rotate per visit. To MANAGE reviews, add/edit/remove items in this array (this is the review management).

reviews.name: Maya R.
reviews.text: The softest fabric we've found — my daughter lives in these. Washed a dozen times and still perfect.

reviews.name: Daniel K.
reviews.text: Ordered for my newborn and the quality blew me away for the price. Shipping was fast and free.

reviews.name: Sophie L.
reviews.text: Beautiful, modern designs that actually fit. The snap closures make 3am changes so much easier.

reviews.name: Noa B.
reviews.text: Gift-wrapped feeling, gentle on my baby's skin. Already ordered three more.

reviews.name: Tom H.
reviews.text: Finally a baby brand that looks as good as it feels. Returns policy gave me total peace of mind.

reviews.name: Aria M.
reviews.text: Obsessed. Every piece photographs beautifully and holds up to a very active toddler.

reviews.name: Hila S.
reviews.text: Arrived in 8 days, beautifully packed. The cotton is genuinely premium — not what I expected at this price.

reviews.name: Emma W.
reviews.text: My go-to baby shower gift now. Everyone asks where it's from.

reviews.name: Liam P.
reviews.text: Sizes run true and the colors stay vivid after washing. Couldn't be happier.

reviews.name: Yael C.
reviews.text: Soft, breathable, and adorable. My little one is comfortable all day.

reviews.name: Chloe D.
reviews.text: Customer service was lovely and the free returns made trying sizes stress-free.

reviews.name: Ben A.
reviews.text: Looks premium, feels premium, priced fairly. Already a repeat customer.

sections.description: Shows the products THIS visitor looked at most (stored in browser localStorage as 'tob_recent'). Hidden when empty. Product pages should push the viewed product into localStorage.
sections.heading: Recently viewed
sections.data_source: browser localStorage 'tob_recent' (set on each product page view)

sections.description: Floating popup (bottom-left) cycling real products as recent purchases — appended automatically by the renderer after all sections.
sections.content: {city} just purchased {real product} · {n} minutes ago · ✔ verified

sections.description: Rich dark footer (TerminalX-style): brand + tagline + social, then link columns, then a copyright bar.
sections.tagline: Thoughtfully designed baby essentials in premium organic cotton. Made for the moments that matter.
sections.copyright: © 2026 TIMEOF BABY · Free shipping on all orders · 30-day returns

behaviors.marquee: CSS keyframe translateX(-50%) infinite over scroll_seconds
behaviors.hero_carousel: JS interval swaps the .active ; dots clickable; gradient overlay via .tob-hero::after
behaviors.product_grid: Liquid loop over collections[collection].products limit N
behaviors.recently_viewed: reads localStorage tob_recent (array of {n:name,i:image,pr:price,u:url}); hide if empty
behaviors.social_proof: JS cycles real product names + random cities as 'just purchased' toasts

open_issues: Hero images must be verified baby/kids and must not duplicate product or tile images
Most products have only 1 image — source 3-5 real images each
Color option not yet sourced from CJ
Footer is currently homepage-only via this section; making it site-wide needs the theme footer-group
Recently-viewed requires the product page to write localStorage on view
